name: Two figures
identity: Two human-sized individuals emerging from the forest shadows, likely captors or raiders. They are equipped with crude spears and wear furs and leather, moving with practiced stealth.
current_status: Emerging from the shadows of the pines and approaching the player. One figure gestures with a spear and speaks in a low, guttural language, indicating the player is their captive.

volatile_state.current_activity: Emerging from shadows and confronting the player as captives

notes: Language is unknown to the player. Intent is clear (captive) but specific faction or origin is not yet revealed.
